title: Demkia Robot Toys for Kids Building Set, 588PCS Rechargeable 4 in 1 APP & Remote Control Robotics Kit Educational Building STEM Toys, Birthday Gifts Build A Robot for Boys Ages 6 7 8-12+
features: 【4-in-1 Technic Robot Building Kit】Build one of 4 unique forms at a time: WALL Robot, Scorpion Crane, Engineering Grader, or Scout Tank. Multiple build options encourage creative play.

【Detailed Articulation & Gear Linkage】Toy Robot’s head automatically swings side to side as the tracks move, adding a playful touch. Fully articulated fingers, palms, and arms enable free movement. Chest panel opens flat, providing extra play space for imagination.

【2.4GHz Remote & Bluetooth App Control】Easily control the robotics kit via remote or the app, which offers 4 fun modes: Control, Driving, Path, and STEM Coding. Stable, well-built structure with moderate speed. Smooth 360° movement and good durability for active play. (Remote needs 2 AAA batteries, not included.)

【Easy-to-Follow Instructions】Comes with a clear printed manual covering all 4 robot models, plus a QR code to download the app. Parents or grandparents are encouraged to build a robot together with kids for a fun and rewarding experience. Need a digital copy? Just contact us via the after-sales email on the box.

【Rechargeable & Long-Lasting Fun】Features a built-in 3.7V 500mAh Li-Po battery safely embedded in the motor block. A full charge takes about 80 minutes and provides up to 45 minutes of exciting play. Can be used even without a full charge. (Includes a Type-C to USB charging cable)

【Build Your Own Robot with Demkia】This robot science kit is an ideal STEM toy for boys aged 8-12. It helps develop hand-eye coordination, fine motor skills, logical thinking, and creativity through engaging play. A fun and educational way to learn while building.

【Great Gift for Kids, Teens & Adults】Beautifully packaged, this robotics kit for kids 8-12 makes a perfect gift for birthdays, holidays, Christmas or special occasions. Of course, it’s also a fun and thoughtful present for teens or adult hobbyists who love building and RC toys.
